name: Danske Invest Fonde KL DKK d
summary: Danske Invest Fonde KL DKK d is a fund of funds that invests in other Danske Invest funds. It aims to provide investors with a diversified portfolio across various asset classes and geographic regions through its investments in different funds managed by Danske Invest, denominated in DKK. The fund offers a convenient way to achieve diversification within a single investment vehicle.
